category_sources: source_facts.description says rsnapshot is a file system snapshot utility based on rsync; official HOWTO says it takes filesystem snapshots at different points in time.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rsnapshot; official HOWTO title is rsnapshot HOWTO.
docs_sources: Official rsnapshot.org HOWTO is a dedicated documentation page for installation and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rsnapshot/rsnapshot, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies file-system snapshots based on rsync; official HOWTO describes local and remote filesystem snapshots.
